home.name: Francy Santos
home.bio:
I am a Fullstack Developer specialist in Serverless architectures and high-scalability solutions. With a solid background in Graphic Design and UI, I blend aesthetics and performance within the Cloudflare ecosystem (Workers, KV, D1, R2 etc...), while also mastering platforms like Vercel and AWS Amplify.

I transform complex ideas into complete and high-performance digital experiences, always prioritizing Developer Experience and the delivery of robust end-to-end products.
